title: Rei II and Gendo
wikitext:
[]: Rei II and Gendo             Quote Post by Kisses4Katie » Sun Jan 14, 2018 7:31 pm I have a quick question I cannot find the answer to, but I feel it might merit a deeper discussion and analyses. I just can't seem to figure out what that might be! Is there a reason that Gendo burned his hands and saved Rei in general in her first sync test? At the time we know it is meant to show how Gendo cares for her and is able to show emotion and also to show just HOW distant he is from Shinji. It also serves as a means for Rei to aquire his glasses. But at the end of the series, knowing that she is a clone and they could have brought another one in at any time, why did Gendo save this particular Rei? Especially when he seemed fairly callous of her life later on in the next episode in the fight against Ramiel?

[]: Re: Rei II and Gendo             Quote Post by Storm » Sun Jan 14, 2018 7:38 pm Kisses4Katie wrote: I have a quick question I cannot find the answer to, but I feel it might merit a deeper discussion and analyses. I just can't seem to figure out what that might be! Is there a reason that Gendo burned his hands and saved Rei in general in her first sync test? At the time we know it is meant to show how Gendo cares for her and is able to show emotion and also to show just HOW distant he is from Shinji. It also serves as a means for Rei to aquire his glasses. But at the end of the series, knowing that she is a clone and they could have brought another one in at any time, why did Gendo save this particular Rei? Especially when he seemed fairly callous of her life later on in the next episode in the fight against Ramiel?

[]: Re: Rei II and Gendo             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Jan 15, 2018 10:42 am Storm wrote: When Rei is in danger against Armisael, Eva-01 is promptly launched in her defense - a measure Gendo didn't take to protect Asuka an episode earlier.

[]: Re: Rei II and Gendo             Quote Post by Storm » Mon Jan 15, 2018 4:15 pm Blockio wrote: Just for the sake of accuracy (and my OCD), dont you mean earlier? Arael came before Armisael
